document.title: Orange County Procurement Procedures Manual
document.authority: Orange County Procurement Ordinance, Chapter 17 Finance Article III
document.procurement_manager: Carrie Mathes, MPA, CFCM, CPPO, CPPB, C.P.M., A.P.P.

small_purchase.competition: Open market with or without competition
small_purchase.mwbe_requirement: Every attempt shall be made to secure from certified M/WBE vendors
small_purchase.notes: Departments shall maximize use of P-Card program for viable transactions under $10,000. Users may utilize requisitions under $10,000 when P-Card is not an option.

informal_quotes.competition: Minimum three (3) written quotes from selected vendors
informal_quotes.mwbe_requirement: At least one quote from a certified M/WBE vendor, if available
informal_quotes.solicitation: Departments/Divisions may solicit written quotes for projects under $150,000, subject to Procurement Division review and acceptance. Requirements over $150,000 shall be solicited by the Procurement Division.
informal_quotes.project_information_sheet: Required for all items solicited by the Procurement Division
informal_quotes.sole_source_documentation: Required for any proprietary or unique need impacting competition. Price reasonableness analysis required.
informal_quotes.acs_forms: Alternate Contract Source documentation and Piggyback forms required for use of other entity contracts
informal_quotes.department_quoting_limit: $100,000 (Exhibit 40 form required; County Funded Only, disallowed for grants)
informal_quotes.notes: Quotations solicited at the Department/Division level shall not exceed $150,000 unless a Sole Source or a time sensitive emergency applies.

formal_solicitations.method: Invitation for Bids (IFB) or Request for Proposals (RFP) – Formal Sealed Solicitation
formal_solicitations.competition: Procured formally on the open market by the Procurement Division
formal_solicitations.board_approval_threshold: Applicable to solicitations, emergencies, sole sources and exemptions over $500,000
formal_solicitations.solicitation: All formal procurements shall be solicited by the Procurement Division
formal_solicitations.project_information_sheet: Required for all items solicited by the Procurement Division
formal_solicitations.mwbe_requirement: Requires coordination with Business Development Division to ensure M/WBE goals are incorporated and evaluated
formal_solicitations.notes: When a purchase or contract may extend over multiple periods or years, the maximum amount to be paid for all years determines if a formal solicitation is required.

standard_orange_county.resolution_authority: Resolution No. 2019-M-30 (adopted August 6, 2019, effective October 1, 2019). Board to review and adjust for CPI inflation every 5 years (next review 2025).

federal_funding.resolution: 2021-M-29 (adopted August 24, 2021, retroactively effective March 3, 2021) – sets mandatory bid threshold for federal procurements to match Federal Simplified Acquisition Threshold

micro_purchase.competition: Open market with or without competition
requirements: Distribute micro-purchases equitably among qualified suppliers
Use small and minority businesses, women's business enterprises, and labor surplus area firms when possible
All contractors/suppliers checked in SAM.gov to ensure free of exclusions
Federal Compliance Documentation Form (Exhibit 36) required for requisitions (excluding P-Card transactions)
micro_purchase.davis_bacon: Construction over $2,000 requires compliance. Construction over $2,000 shall not be placed on P-Card.

simplified_acquisition.competition: Minimum three (3) quotes solicited and securing minimum two (2) written quotes. If less than two (2) received, sole source form required. FEMA grants require three (3) solicited and three (3) secured.
simplified_acquisition.solicitation: Departments/Divisions may solicit written quotes for projects under $250,000 subject to Procurement Division review. Requirements over $250,000 shall be solicited by the Procurement Division.
simplified_acquisition.federal_compliance_form: Required for requisitions under $100,000 where the department/division has solicited quotations
simplified_acquisition.documentation_of_negotiation: Required to negotiate profit as a separate element for contracts with no price competition (single response or sole sources)
simplified_acquisition.davis_bacon: Construction requires compliance with Davis-Bacon Act and prevailing wage determinations
simplified_acquisition.notes: Quotations at the Department/Division level shall not exceed $250,000 unless Sole Source or time sensitive emergency applies.

formal_solicitations.method: Invitation for Bids (IFB) or Request for Proposals (RFP) – Formal Sealed Solicitation
formal_solicitations.competition: Procured formally on open market by Procurement Division
formal_solicitations.solicitation: All formal procurements shall be solicited by the Procurement Division
formal_solicitations.federal_compliance_form: Required for requisitions where the department has solicited quotations
formal_solicitations.independent_estimate: Required in connection with every procurement action including contract modifications
formal_solicitations.written_cost_analysis: Required (written cost analysis or price analysis) for every procurement action including contract modifications
formal_solicitations.documentation_of_negotiation: Required to negotiate profit as a separate element for contracts with no price competition and in all cases where cost analysis is performed

other_restrictions: Brand specific references are disallowed (unless equivalents are allowed)
Percentage of construction cost method is disallowed
Orange County M/WBE Requirements are disallowed
Orange County Contractor Pre-Qualifications are disallowed
Expressed written consent from the Federal Funding Source is required for waiver of a restriction

requisition_requirements.threshold: Required for procurements exceeding $10,000 (unless exempt from encumbrance requirements or otherwise encumbered using a Delivery Order)
requisition_requirements.authorization: Must be authorized by the Department Director/Division Manager or designee prior to submission

required_header_fields.general_information_tab: Budget FY, Fiscal Year, Period – Leave blank for Advantage to assign
required_header_fields.reference_tab: REQUIRED – must note contract number, emergency status, sole source status, or other classification. Requisition will not validate without reference.
required_header_fields.contact_tab: User ID of person issuing requisition (defaulted by sign-on); requester user ID or name and phone number

fob_options: FOB Destination, Freight Prepaid (preferred – shipping charges included in price)
FOB Destination, Freight Allowed (shipping charges added as additional charge)

required_header_fields.vendor: Vendor code for vendor who submitted quote. If formal solicitation required, enter 99999 with contact name and phone.
required_header_fields.accounting_distribution: Applicable budget line funding the procurement; percentage of order charged to accounting line
required_header_fields.special_instructions: Up to three special instructions (e.g., check to accompany order, special delivery, insurance required)

commodity.commodity_code: Required (system will reject if not entered)
commodity.extended_description: Clear description including size, color, type, grade; reference quote number
commodity.unit_price: Customer must estimate cost; Procurement Division verifies

required_reporting_codes: Funding Type (Reporting 3) – CRITICAL: Standard, Federally Compliant, or State Compliant
backup_documentation_required: Detailed Scope of Services (Services) or Detailed Specification (Goods)
For competitive quotes obtained at department level: names of vendors, vendor number, date of quote, quotes per item, quote number, individuals submitting quotes, total pricing from each vendor
Expedited Quoting Form (Exhibit 40) – MANDATORY for all competitive quotes at department/division level up to $100,000
Short Form Request for Quotations (Exhibit 33) – encouraged
Sole Source Procurement Data Sheet (Exhibit 2) if sole source
Emergency Procurement Data Sheet (Exhibit 1) if emergency
Documentation confirming required divisional reviews (IT, Risk Management, etc.)

division_review_required.type: Computer Equipment (including Copiers/peripherals with network access) and Software not on County Standards List

division_review_required.division: Risk Management Division & Information Systems and Services Division
County Administration or applicable Department Director

minimum_lead_times: 10 working days – routine goods or services to be quoted (>small dollar threshold to mandatory bid limit)
4 weeks – informal solicitation not requiring Board approval
12 weeks – formal solicitation requiring Board approval (allow 4 weeks for Board approval)
requisition_requirements.fiscal_year_start_rule: Purchase requisitions for fiscal year start must be created within 10 working days after October 1st
conditions_requiring_justification: Goods received or completed before PO issued – must include justification and may require department director approval
Used/refurbished/reconditioned equipment – requires memorandum to Procurement Manager detailing cost savings and written confirmation of no operational/safety/maintenance risks
No subdivision of contracts to avoid bid/quotation thresholds permitted

purchase_order_requirements.source: Section 3 – Purchase Orders and Blanket Purchase Orders
purchase_order_requirements.issuance: Pre-numbered, computer generated POs issued by Procurement Division only (except Delivery Orders) upon receipt of properly authorized requisition, after receipt of competitive bids/proposals/quotations, determination of funds availability, and Board approval if necessary

blanket_purchase_order.purpose: BPO issued for indeterminable miscellaneous items over a period of time (not to exceed one fiscal year)
required_fields: Description and type of items to be purchased
Period of time the order will remain valid (not to exceed end of fiscal year)
Provision for cancellation at any time
blanket_purchase_order.individual_purchase_limits: May be set by Procurement Division; changes require written request and Procurement Manager approval

tear_down_and_quote_pos.format: Per Exhibit 28 – must state purpose as tear down and quote for specific equipment
required_fields: Purpose of PO (tear down and quote)
Scope of services (two quotations: re-assembly cost and repair cost)
tear_down_and_quote_pos.maximum_cost: Must not exceed the mandatory bid limit ($150,000)
tear_down_and_quote_pos.additional_repair_threshold: Repairs up to 15% above PO amount require written division manager approval; over 15% requires Procurement Manager written approval
rules: No County equipment removed from premises unless vendor signs receipt
Vendor must not proceed with repairs until PO is issued
Failure to submit requisition concurrent with authorization = non-PO
Equipment with Fleet asset number must be repaired by Fleet Management Division

purchase_order_requirements.advance_payment: Division Manager/Assistant Manager or Department Director/Deputy Director must provide written memorandum to Procurement Manager

timeframes: New Delivery Order at fiscal year start: within 10 working days after October 1
New Delivery Order for new Master Agreement: within 3 working days of Advantage update
Delivery Order for Master Agreement renewal: within 3 working days of Advantage update
delivery_orders.note: Occurrences outside these timeframes result in a Non-PO

quotation_bid_requirements.minimum_quotes: Every effort to obtain minimum three (3) written quotations; at least one from a certified M/WBE firm if available
quotation_bid_requirements.no_quote_rule: A firm's failure to reply shall be documented as a no-quote and qualifies as an attempt toward the three-quote minimum
quotation_bid_requirements.mwbe_documentation: If no M/WBE availability matching scope, document on Expedited Quoting Form
quotation_bid_requirements.quote_submission: Written RFQs may be mailed or faxed; must indicate deadline for receipt
quotation_bid_requirements.emergency_exemption: Emergency purchases exempt from competition with prior Procurement Manager approval
quotation_bid_requirements.rfq_maintenance: RFQs must be maintained with the purchase order

formal_solicitations.responsibility: Procurement Division responsible for all procurements over mandatory bid limit
formal_solicitations.advertisement: Shall be posted on County website; available on County internet site
formal_solicitations.bid_deadline: Bids/proposals must be received no later than established time, date and location specified in solicitation
formal_solicitations.submission_method: Electronic via encrypted e-procurement portal (www.ocfl.net/eprocurement) unless otherwise specified
formal_solicitations.bid_security: Bonds, certified check, or cashier's check required for certain purchases over $100,000

construction_term_contracts.bid_bonds: Penal sum must not be less than 10% of total estimated bid amount for first contract year
construction_term_contracts.payment_performance_bonds: Bond amounts equal 100% of total estimated contract amount for first contract year

quotation_bid_requirements.quotes_firm_period: Price quotes must be firm for 60 days (per Short Form RFQ Exhibit 33)
award_criteria: Ability, capacity, equipment and skill of bidder
Ability to perform within specified time
Character, integrity, reputation, judgment, experience and efficiency
Quality of performance on previous contracts
Quality, availability and adaptability of supplies/services
Ability to provide future maintenance and service
Ability to comply with M/WBE requirements
quotation_bid_requirements.error_correction: Unit prices shall not be changed; words govern over figures when there is a discrepancy
tie_bids: 1. Orange County principal place of business preference
5. Drawing lots or coin flip (witnessed by minimum 3 individuals)

alternate_contract_sources_piggyback.source: Section 10 – Competition Exemptions, Standardization and Alternate Contract Sources
alternate_contract_sources_piggyback.authority: Procurement Manager may join other units of government in cooperative procurement ventures

state_florida_gsa_contracts.rule: Purchases in ANY amount may be made against State of Florida and Federal GSA contracts without bidding, provided in best interest of County
state_florida_gsa_contracts.gsa_over_50k: GSA Schedule procurements over $50,000 must be supported by price analysis memorandum demonstrating pricing advantages
state_florida_gsa_contracts.gsa_authorization: For non-Cooperative Procurement GSA contracts, contractor must provide written affirmation that contract terms/conditions/pricing apply to Orange County
state_florida_gsa_contracts.minor_optional_items: Minor dollar value optional items not covered by contract may be approved by Procurement Division with adequate justification
state_florida_gsa_contracts.state_contract_note: Department must evaluate if contract includes ALL requirements before requisitioning

eligibility_criteria: Work/services/commodities must be specifically within scope of the contract
Bid tabulation (IFB) or scoring matrix (RFP), proof of award, copy of contract, and competition information must be supplied
Contract must contain a cooperative or piggyback provision allowing use by other government agencies
insurance_required_for: Services performed at a County facility or on County property
Services performed for County where liability may be an issue
Commodities requiring frequent visits to County facilities/property
piggyback_requirements.federal_funding_note: Piggybacking is DISALLOWED for federal-funded procurements (use of another agency's solicitation process). Cooperative procurement is allowed.

contract_approval.approval_level: Contract level – NOT at cooperative entity or agency level
contract_approval.approved_sources: Logged by Procurement Division and accessible by County Departments and Divisions

direct_award_mwbe.threshold: Less than the formal solicitation threshold ($150,000)
direct_award_mwbe.form: Direct Award to Orange County Certified M/WBE Recommendation with Documentation of Price Reasonableness (Exhibit 41)
direct_award_mwbe.requirements: Must comply with all other compliance requirements including insurance, business registration and licensure

competition_exemptions.authorization_required: Procurement Manager or designee; use Purchase Order/Contract Documentation of Exemption Form (Exhibit 30)
exempt_categories: Agreements between BCC and non-profit organizations or governmental entities (procurement, transfer, sale or exchange of goods/services)
Dues and memberships in trade or professional organizations
Subscriptions for periodicals
Advertisements
Postage
Paralegal services, expert witnesses, court reporters and specialized legal services
Abstracts of titles for real property
Title insurance for real property
Real property
Water, sewer, and electrical utility services
Copyrighted materials
Patented materials
Art and artistic services
Employment agreements
Fees and costs of job-related travel, seminars, tuition, registration and training
Goods and/or services given or accepted by the County via grant, gift or bequest
Goods purchased with petty cash in accordance with established County procedures
Purchases from State of Florida, Federal GSA Contracts or contracts awarded by any local, state, or national governmental agency, cooperative procurement organizations or procurement associations
Blanket purchase orders issued on annual basis where exact quantity/items cannot be determined in advance
Items purchased for resale to the general public
competition_exemptions.monetary_gifts_exception: Procurement transactions involving monetary gifts (donations/financial contributions) require PRIOR APPROVAL by the Board of County Commissioners
competition_exemptions.critical_note: Exemption from competition DOES NOT convey exemption from requesting a timely encumbrance before goods are delivered or services are rendered
competition_exemptions.federal_funding_note: Exemptions from competition DO NOT apply for federal-funded procurements
competition_exemptions.documentation_threshold: Documentation of Exemption NOT required for small purchases (up to $10,000); REQUIRED for informal ($10K-$150K) and formal (>$150K) if applicable

by_dollar_level.approver: Department/Division (P-Card or single quotation); Procurement Division not required
Procurement Division; Department Director/Division Manager signs requisition
Board of County Commissioners required for solicitations, emergencies, sole sources and exemptions
by_dollar_level.lead_time: Allow 4 weeks for Board approval; 12 weeks total from requisition to PO

emergency_procurement.below_mandatory_bid_limit: Procurement Manager or designee may authorize
emergency_procurement.above_mandatory_bid_limit: Only Procurement Manager or designee may authorize
emergency_procurement.above_board_approval_limit: Must be ratified by Board of County Commissioners
emergency_procurement.emergency_justification_form: Exhibit 1 must be signed by department/division manager or acting manager/assistant manager
emergency_procurement.post_approval_emergency: Division Manager or designee may authorize for bona fide health/public safety/operational/property damage emergencies requiring immediate action; must email ProcurementEmergency@ocfl.net immediately
emergency_procurement.evidence_deadline: Submit within 3 business days following date of service

sole_source.below_manager_limit: Certified and approved by Procurement Manager
sole_source.above_manager_limit: Submitted to Board of County Commissioners
sole_source.price_negotiation_memo: Exhibit 3 may be required when Board approval needed or for federal procurements over $10,000

contract_modifications.within_scope: Procurement Manager may authorize up to amount allowed by Procurement Ordinance
contract_modifications.verbal_orders: Project Manager may issue verbal change orders for emergencies; confirm in writing within 5 calendar days; formal change order within 30 calendar days

task_authorizations_continuing_contracts.authority: Procurement Manager or designee may approve individual task authorizations within overall scope and within Florida Statute 287.055 limits
task_authorizations_continuing_contracts.change_orders: Procurement Manager reviews; items advance to Board unless within procurement authority

approval_requirements.standardization_requests: All must be approved by Manager, Procurement Division
approval_requirements.advance_payments: Division Manager/Assistant Manager or Department Director/Deputy Director written memorandum to Procurement Manager

insurance_coi_requirements.source: Section 10, Exhibit 33 (Short Form RFQ), and Exhibit 37/38
when_required: Services performed at a County facility or on County property
Services performed for County where liability may be an issue
Commodities requiring frequent visits to County facilities/property
P-Card transactions for services (limited to firms listed as Approved Insurance Certificates with compliant and non-expired status)

standard_coverage_short_form_rfq.contractor_deadline: Must possess or obtain within 10 days of notification by the County

commercial_general_liability.coverage: ISO form as filed for use in Florida or equivalent
endorsements: Orange County BCC listed as Additional Insured – Form CG 20 26 or CG 20 10/CG 20 37 or equivalents
Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery in favor of Orange County BCC – Form CG 24 04 or equivalent

business_automobile_liability.coverage: All owned, non-owned and hired vehicles, ISO form or equivalent

workers_compensation.employers_liability: No less than $100,000 each incident of bodily injury or disease
endorsements: Waiver of Subrogation in favor of Orange County BCC – Form WC 00 03 13 or equivalent

standard_coverage_short_form_rfq.certificate_holder: Orange County BCC, Attn: Procurement Division, 400 E. South Street, 2nd Floor, Orlando, Florida 32801

insurance_coi_requirements.payment_terms_rfq: Net 45, in accordance with the Local Government Prompt Payment Act, F.S. 218.70
insurance_coi_requirements.risk_management_coordination: Required for all threshold levels to ensure insurance requirements are established and met
insurance_coi_requirements.pcard_services: P-Card transactions for services limited to firms listed as 'Approved Insurance Certificates' with compliant and non-expired status

body_fields: Name of all sources contacted and their quotes (Recommended Source, Person Contacted, Amount; Other Sources x2)

Circumstances resulting in non-competitive procurement (checkboxes): Public exigency/emergency; Inadequate competition after solicitation; Federal awarding agency expressly authorizes; Not Applicable (competitive quotes obtained)
Adverse impacts if Emergency Procurement not approved and expedited
Research and analysis to determine pricing is fair and reasonable
approval_fields: Division Manager OR Department Director – Signature and Date
Print Div. Manager or Dept. Director Name
Buyer/Purchasing Agent/Senior Contract Administrator – Signature and Date
exhibit_1_emergency_procurement_justific.note: Procurements over $100,000 may require a Price Negotiation Memorandum and Board Approval

required_elements: Statement of Purpose: 'The purpose of this purchase order is to provide a tear down and quote to determine the extent of repairs required for the following equipment'
a) Cost to re-assemble equipment and return to County site if previously removed ($____)
Statement: 'This purchase order is our acceptance of your quote for the cost of repairs, or reassemble and return'

exhibit_29_procurement_thresholds.description: One-page reference document listing Standard and Federal thresholds
standard_thresholds: Informal Quotes: >$10,000 to $150,000 (minimum 3 written quotes, 1 M/WBE)

exemption_checkboxes: Agreements between BCC and non-profit organizations or governmental entities
Procurement of dues and memberships in trade or professional organizations
Real property, abstracts of titles for real property & title insurance for real property
Water, sewer, and electrical utility services
Fees and costs of job-related travel, seminars, tuition, registration and training
Goods and/or services given, or accepted by county via grant, gift or bequest
Blanket purchase orders issued on annual basis
Items purchased for resale to general public
approval_process: 1. Indicate exemption requested by making selection above
3. Sign, date and attach to applicable purchase requisition back-up
exhibit_30_documentation_of_exemption.certification: I certify that to the best of my knowledge, this request for exemption and the information provided herein is accurate and truthful
signatures: Division Manager OR Department Director – Signature, Date, Print Name
Procurement Manager or Authorized Designee – Signature, Date

validate: Contract contains a cooperative or piggy-back provision allowing use by other government agencies
I have reviewed the terms and conditions and take no exception
Payment provision is no less than Net 30

requestor_steps.attach: Formal Solicitation (Invitation for Bids or Request for Proposals)
validate: Solicitation was advertised, open and unrestricted

requestor_steps.attach: Bid tabulation, Score Sheet or proof of award

checks: Method of Selection meets competitive standards
Terms and Conditions are not objectionable
Pricing methodology is structured, verifiable and auditable

signatures: Requesting Department Director/Division Manager – Signature, Print, Date
Procurement Division Approval – Procurement Manager or Authorized Designee – Signature, Date
exhibit_31_alternate_contract_source_app.logging: LOGGED: Buyer Initials, Date (Scanned format: Vendor Name_Contract Number)

exhibit_32_piggyback_requisition_checkli.review_type: Standard Review OR Federal Uniform Guidance Review (checkbox)
exhibit_32_piggyback_requisition_checkli.note: FOR APPROVED ALTERNATE CONTRACT SOURCES (ACS) ONLY

validate: Confirm Contract is on the ACS log
Vendor Name on the contract matches the quote and requisition

requestor_steps.attach: Line-by-Line Pricing Validation (Critical) – Highlighted price sheets matching contractual prices
validate: Validate each item offered in the quotation is verifiable on the contract and accurately priced

attach: GSA Procurements over 50K require written analysis demonstrating most advantageous procurement method
GSA Procurements require signed statement from contract holder authorizing County's use (not applicable to COOP PURCH)
validate: After analysis, pricing is deemed reasonable and documented in memo format and attached to quote
Contract Holder statement is on letterhead

signatures: IF APPLICABLE: Contract Pricing/Open Market Ratio Evaluation Pass/Fail – Procurement Manager/Administrator Signature

header_fields: Price Quotes Must Be Firm for 60 Days
exhibit_33_short_form_rfq.payment_terms: Net 45, in accordance with Local Government Prompt Payment Act, F.S. 218.70
exhibit_33_short_form_rfq.order_terms: Delivery/Performance required ___ days After Receipt of Order; FOB Destination – Freight Prepaid

insurance_section.note: Contractor shall possess or obtain within 10 days of notification
initials_required_for: Commercial General Liability ($500,000 min; OC BCC as Additional Insured; Waiver of Recovery)
Business Automobile Liability ($500,000 per accident min)
Workers' Compensation (statutory limits; $100,000 each incident employers liability; Waiver of Subrogation)

exhibit_37_standard_thresholds_guideline.description: Full-detail reference chart comparing requirements across three threshold levels
columns: Small Purchase (P-Card or Single Quotation) Up to $10,000

exhibit_38_federal_thresholds_guideline.description: Full-detail reference chart for federal-funded procurements
columns: Micro Purchases (P-Card or Single Quotation) Up to $10,000

exhibit_40_department_expediting_form.title: Department/Division Expedited Quoting (Up to $100,000) – County Funded Only – DISALLOWED FOR GRANTS

mwbe_sources.label: Orange County Certified Minority/Woman Business Entity (M/WBE) Sources Solicited (Quotes Attached)
mwbe_sources.instruction: Departments/Divisions shall engage one or more registered firms, if available
mwbe_sources.attestation: I have reviewed the list of Orange County Registered M/WBE. By signing, I attest there were no registered OC M/WBE sources matching the scope. [Attestation Signature – Only applicable if no M/WBE is solicited]

exhibit_40_department_expediting_form.rule: At least three (3) vendors including at least one M/WBE vendor; provide vendor name, vendor number, date of quote, quotes per item, quote number, individuals submitting quotes, and total pricing. Quotes must be verifiable.

validation_rules.anti_splitting: No contract, purchase or group of requisitions shall be subdivided to avoid bid, quotation or approval requirements
validation_rules.anti_combining: Equal caution against combining requirements in ways that reduce competition
validation_rules.pcard_insurance: All P-Card transactions for services on County property require insurance. Limited to firms listed as 'Approved Insurance Certificates' with compliant and non-expired status.
validation_rules.contract_active_check: A purchase cannot be made against a contract that has expired
validation_rules.acs_expiration_check: Confirm Contract is on ACS log AND contract is not expired before proceeding with piggyback requisition
validation_rules.pricing_validation: Line-by-line pricing validation required for ACS/piggyback purchases. Flag any open market items.
validation_rules.gsa_50k_analysis: Written analysis required for GSA procurements over $50,000 demonstrating pricing advantages
validation_rules.mandatory_bid_review: Procurement Division reserves right to solicit or re-solicit all informal requirements
validation_rules.no_quote_documentation: No-quotes must be documented and do not count toward competition minimums for federal funding
validation_rules.sam_gov_check: All contractors/suppliers must be checked in SAM.gov for federal-funded procurements to ensure free of exclusions
validation_rules.florida_suspended_debarred: Contractors must not be on Florida Convicted/Suspended/Discriminatory Complaint Vendor List
validation_rules.orange_county_suspended_debarred: Orange County Suspension and Debarment limitations apply at all threshold levels

delivery_order_timeframes.new_master_agreement: Within 3 working days of Advantage update
delivery_order_timeframes.renewal: Within 3 working days of Advantage update

change_order_requirements: Must submit Change Order Request (Exhibit 11) with original PO number and reason
Revised or new quote must accompany change order form
Price change without explanation may be returned
New requisition required for new FY encumbrances
Cannot extend services beyond original PO service dates (except multi-year agreements like leases)
validation_rules.verbal_order_confirmation: Verbal change orders must be confirmed in writing within 5 calendar days; formal change order within 30 calendar days
validation_rules.federal_davis_bacon: For federally-funded construction over $2,000: prevailing wage determination must be included in solicitation AND validated 10 days prior to closing solicitation period
validation_rules.federal_profit_negotiation: For federal-funded contracts over $10,000 with no price competition, profit must be negotiated as a separate element
validation_rules.pilot_projects: Departments prohibited from initiating equipment/technology evaluations or pilot projects without prior Procurement Division approval. Loaned equipment requires bailment agreement.
validation_rules.used_equipment: Requires memorandum to Procurement Manager detailing cost savings and confirmation of no operational/safety/maintenance risks; competitive process still required
validation_rules.independent_estimate: Cannot be based on the budget; budgets must be sufficiently funded to support the amount of the Independent Estimate
validation_rules.tax_price_quotes_firm: Price quotes must be firm for 60 days
validation_rules.object_code_accuracy: User department/division solely responsible for accuracy of object codes; incorrect codes may result in cancellation
validation_rules.reporting_3_federal: CRITICAL – failure to make appropriate funding type selection in Reporting 3 may result in non-compliant procurement, funding disallowances and major adverse impacts

emergency_procurement.source: Section 4 – Emergency and Sole Source Procurements
emergency_procurement.definition: Acquisition of goods or services necessary to remedy/lessen harmful effects of actual or threatened occurrence which may interfere with normal business, or remedy conditions posing imminent/existing threat to health, safety or welfare
emergency_procurement.not_qualifying: Lack of planning or funding surpluses do NOT constitute an emergency

steps: Obtain quotes or explain why quotes could not be obtained
Submit Emergency Procurement Data Sheet (Exhibit 1) signed by division manager or acting manager
Submit requisition as expeditiously as possible
Approval of emergency services may require Risk Management recommendations
standard_procedure.email: ProcurementEmergency@ocfl.net (accessible by Procurement Manager and all Procurement Division Supervisors)

immediate_action_procedure.applies_to: Bona fide health, public safety, operational or property damage emergencies
immediate_action_procedure.notification: Email ProcurementEmergency@ocfl.net immediately with emergency requirement summary, justification, and actions authorized
immediate_action_procedure.evidence_deadline: Within 3 business days following date of service
immediate_action_procedure.risk: Considered at-risk of Non-PO if found to be non-emergency or unnecessary deviation from standard procedure

declared_emergency.authority: Orange County Code Section 2-306; Director of Emergency Management may waive certain procedures
declared_emergency.efpo: Emergency Field Purchase Orders (Exhibit 39) may be authorized by Procurement Division Manager or delegates. In absence, Mayor authorizes delegate.
declared_emergency.ratification: Upon resuming standard operations, EFPOs shall be ratified with Standard Requisition or Delivery Order referencing EFPO Number

price_reasonableness_methods: Comparable purchases by other Governmental Agencies
Past Purchase History with specific contract/PO references
Comparison to internally developed project estimate
Comparison of outsourced vs. internal staff/resource costs
Analysis of unit rates for labor categories vs. County's labor rates
Maintenance costs as percentage of original purchase costs vs. industry trends
Pricing trends supported by CPI, PPI or other governmental index
Documentation demonstrating profit margins within reasonable ratios

sole_source_procurement.definition: Acquisition of supplies, equipment and contractual services that (1) is the only good or service that will produce the desired results or most appropriate for situation, or (2) is available from only one source and use is both economically and operationally in County's best interest
sole_source_procurement.authorization: Exempt from bid requirements upon certification by Procurement Manager
sole_source_procurement.above_manager_limit: Submit to Board of County Commissioners
sole_source_procurement.price_negotiation_memo: Exhibit 3 may be required when Board approval needed
sole_source_procurement.public_posting_option: At Procurement Division discretion, may be posted on County internet for minimum 10 calendar days
sole_source_procurement.standardization_as_sole_source: Compatibility to existing equipment acceptable justification for waiver of bidding procedures if item meets sole source definition
sole_source_procurement.not_qualifying: Lack of planning or funding surpluses do NOT constitute sole source

grant_funded_procurement.source: Section 8 – Grant Funded Procurement and Contracting

funding_type_reporting_codes.standard: Orange County Funded – Federal/State Funding NOT a consideration
funding_type_reporting_codes.federally_compliant: Federal Grant funded, Federal pass-through dollars, Federally Reimbursable, Disaster Preparedness/Response/Recovery

key_rules: Procurement must be funded before solicitation is published
Must determine Contractor/Supplier vs. Sub-Recipient contract type
Piggybacking prohibited (cooperative contracting allowed with written analysis)
Brand specific requirements may be disallowed
Adequate competition = 3 valid quotations (no-quotes do not count); Federal compliance generally requires 2 responsive; FEMA requires 3 solicited and 3 secured
Davis Bacon Act compliance for construction over $2,000
Independent Estimates required for formal solicitations
Departments must communicate ALL grant-specific requirements to Procurement Division at time of submittal
grant_funded_procurement.expedited_quoting: Only allowed at department level for micro-purchase and simplified acquisition threshold (up to $250,000) unless public exigency applies. Must use Federal Compliance Documentation Form (Exhibit 36).
grant_funded_procurement.master_agreements_restriction: Most Master Agreements NOT federally compliant; use only contracts designated 'Federally Compliant' in Reporting 3. Excluding FEMA, grant procurement shall be project-specific/award-specific.
grant_funded_procurement.federal_micro_purchase_requirement: Distribute purchases equitably among qualified suppliers to extent practicable

procurement_card_program.purpose: Efficient method for small purchases not exceeding single-transaction limits
procurement_card_program.managed_by: Procurement Division in partnership with Comptroller
procurement_card_program.monthly_log: Exhibit 16 (Procurement Card Monthly Purchase Log) – MANDATORY
procurement_card_program.insurance_requirement: All transactions for services on County property require insurance; limited to firms with 'Approved Insurance Certificates' compliant and non-expired status
procurement_card_program.federal_funding_attestation: When federal funding applies, cardholder must attest to equitable distribution and SBA usage
procurement_card_program.prohibited_uses: Not for services on County property without insurance approval
procurement_card_program.exception_process: Exhibit 26 – P-Card Exception Request; must be submitted PRIOR to purchase; post-purchase exceptions not processed

contracting_and_modifications.formal_contract_modifications: Procurement Manager may authorize within Procurement Ordinance limits; Board approval required if exceeds Manager authority
contracting_and_modifications.outside_scope: New formal solicitation required unless soliciting would cause significant delay or adverse impact
contracting_and_modifications.terminations: Procurement Manager has authority to terminate for convenience or default all contracts

liquidated_damages.valid_if: Future damages not readily ascertainable when contract made; amount not grossly disproportionate
liquidated_damages.invalid_if: Future damages readily ascertainable; appears to be a penalty; grossly disproportionate (surveys suggest 10% of contract = not unconscionable; 30% = unconscionable)
liquidated_damages.development_authority: Procurement Division has final authority to modify, approve or deny
